text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's so awesome how everyone gets a fire in their
eyes whenever it's time to race!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I won't lose the next one! Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's true! But in terms of blazing fire, my
eyes burned the weakest!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If our drives were electrical consumption, then
they were dishwashers and I... a mere electric
toothbrush.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Dang it! Why can't I get on their level?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Gasp! It must be because their electric networks are series circuits! I need to get in on that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have to use every trick in the book to stop Gold
Ship from transforming herself into a series
circuit, whatever that entails.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now let's get me some contacts with LED lights so
I can turn my eye-fire up to eleven!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what if I go for ultimate stealth instead?
Sneaking up on people and cooking them with
eye lasers point-blank sounds cool...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship drags me out to an optometrist, but
has no choice but to give up when she's told no
such contacts exist.
